Name: Assassination
Description: Score 5VP if one or more enemy CHARACTER models are destroyed this turn. Score 5VP if the enemy Warlord is destroyed.

Name: Bring It Down
Description: Score 2VP for each enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE destroyed. Score 5VP if the target had Wounds 10+.

Name: Cleanse
Description: Select up to two units eligible to shoot. They cannot shoot or charge. At end of turn, score VP for each objective they control that is not in your deployment zone.

Name: Deploy Teleport Homers
Description: Select units in opponent's deployment zone or center. They cannot shoot/charge. Score VP at end of turn.

Name: Engage On All Fronts
Description: Score VP if you have units wholly within 3 or 4 different table quarters, and more than 3" from center.

Name: Extend Battle Lines
Description: Score 5VP if you control your home objective and one or more No Man's Land objectives.

Name: Investigate Signals
Description: Select units within 9" of corners. They cannot shoot/charge. Score 2VP for each corner secured.

Name: No Prisoners
Description: Score 2VP if one enemy unit is destroyed. Score 5VP if two or more are destroyed.

Name: Overwhelming Force
Description: Score 3VP if an enemy unit on an objective is destroyed. Score 5VP if two or more are destroyed.

Name: Secure No Man's Land
Description: Score 2VP if you control 1 objective in No Man's Land. Score 5VP if you control 2+.

Name: Storm Hostile Objective
Description: Score 5VP if you control an objective that the enemy controlled at the start of the turn.

Name: Area Denial
Description: Score 5VP if there are no enemy units wholly within 6" of the center of the battlefield.

Name: Capture Enemy Outpost
Description: Score 8VP if you control the objective marker in your opponent's deployment zone.

Name: Defend Stronghold
Description: Score 3VP if you control your home objective. Score more if you hold more.

Name: A Tempting Target
Description: Opponent chooses one No Man's Land objective. Score 5VP if you control it at end of turn.
